name: Dana Naser
headline: Data Analyst | SQL | Business Intelligence | KPI Reporting
profile: Third-year B.Sc. Information Systems student specializing in data analysis, business intelligence, and structured data modeling. Strong foundation in SQL, KPI tracking, reporting logic, and analytical problem-solving. Passionate about turning raw data into actionable business insights.

projects.name: Winery Sales & Inventory Analysis
highlights: Designed ERD and normalized tables for reliable querying
Implemented analytical SQL queries for KPI tracking
Simulated reporting logic and identified stock imbalance patterns

projects.name: StockSync
highlights: Responsive web app concept for inventory tracking and recipe suggestions
Structured inventory logic to enable KPI-style monitoring
Focused on mobile accessibility and UI clarity

projects.name: Hospital Operations System
projects.focus: Structured operational data and process logic
highlights: Modeled core entities and workflows for operations management
Built consistent logic for records and coordination
